Title: Kids Celestial Butterfly Graphic Tee
Description:
Celebrate the wonder of nature with this adorable celestial butterfly tee. Featuring a delicate, vibrant butterfly graphic printed on the chest, this t-shirt is perfect for any young fashionista.

  • Design: Cute celestial butterfly design, making it a sweet addition to any kid's wardrobe.
  • Comfort: Crafted from soft, breathable cotton material, ensuring comfort throughout playtime and everyday activities.
  • Fit: Designed for durability and easy movement, making it ideal for all-day wear.

This shirt makes a wonderful gift for children who love nature, butterflies, and gentle, whimsical designs. Easy to pair with jeans or shorts for a complete, charming look.

Size Guide Reference: Please refer to the provided size chart for accurate measurements (inches and centimeters) to ensure the perfect fit.
